_comment: SAIGE MCP Server Configuration — Add MCP servers here
_docs: Each server needs: command, args. Set enabled=true to connect on startup.

browser.name: browser
browser.description: Full Chromium web browser — navigate, click, search Google, read pages, take screenshots

fetch.name: fetch
fetch.description: Fetch web pages and convert to markdown — gives SAIGE real web browsing

computer_use.name: computer_use
computer_use.description: Full virtual desktop control — mouse, keyboard, windows, screenshots, OCR. SAIGE operates a computer like a human.

brave_search.name: brave_search
brave_search.description: Web search via Brave Search API
